name: @jeswr/solid-federation-vocab
description: Federation app-registration (fedapp:) + shared task/issue vocabulary under https://w3id.org/jeswr — experimental, AI-agent-generated.

scripts.typecheck: node --check scripts/validate.mjs && node --check scripts/lint.mjs && node --check scripts/build.mjs && node --check scripts/example.mjs && node --check scripts/ontology-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/import-sectors.mjs
